recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Tamasha
recommendations.overview: Meeting while on vacation, Ved and Tara sense a connection but vow to keep their real identities a secret. Years later, their paths cross again.

recommendations.title: Rockstar
recommendations.overview: College student Janardhan is a simpleton who desperately seeks inspiration for the musician inside him. Although heartbreak helps him reach his goal, it also leads him to self-destruction.

recommendations.title: Highway
recommendations.overview: Right before her wedding, a young woman finds herself abducted and held for ransom. As the initial days pass, she begins to develop a strange bond with her kidnapper.

recommendations.title: Jab Harry Met Sejal
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tour guide develops profound affection for a bubbly traveller while helping her search for a lost engagement ring across various picturesque European destinations.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie
recommendations.overview: Since the moment they met at age 5, Rosie and Alex have been best friends, facing the highs and lows of growing up side by side. A fleeting shared moment, one missed opportunity, and the decisions that follow send their lives in completely different

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: 3, 2, 1... Frankie Go Boom
recommendations.overview: Frank Bartlett has been tortured, embarrassed, and humiliated by his brother Bruce — usually on film — his entire life. Now that Bruce is finally off drugs and has turned his life around, things should be different. They are not.

recommendations.title: Private Lesson
recommendations.overview: Posing as a private tutor, Azra secretly coaches students on achieving their goals in life and love — but not without a few bumps in the road.

recommendations.title: The First Time
recommendations.overview: A spark of attraction smolders, then ignites, between two teens from different high schools who meet by chance at a party.
